title: follow camera + HDR env + bucket picking + M21 research

stories.title: `M21-shadow-pcss` doc gap — note explaining the S41 substitution targets the BASIC-shadowmap getShadow variant, not the modern PCF chunk.
stories.summary: PCSS is currently a no-op on default-PCF projects. Follow-up `M21-shadow-pcss-modern` carries to Sprint 43.
verification: legacy import — see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: `M21-cam-follow` — new `FollowCamera { target, offset, lookAtOffset?, smoothing?
stories.summary: }` component + FollowCameraSystem. Anchors camera to a target entity, computes Euler look-at via Three's -Z convention (`yaw = atan2(-dx, -dz)`, `pitch = atan2(dy, |dxz|)`), supports frame-rate-aware smoothing. 5 unit tests.
verification: legacy import — see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: `M21-env-hdr` — `scene.environment` gains `{ kind: "hdr", url, intensity?
stories.summary: }`. Adapter uses RGBELoader + PMREMGenerator to pre-filter; previous environment stays applied until the new texture lands so the scene doesn't flash unlit. `SceneEnvironmentInput` becomes a discriminated union. 4 new schema tests.
verification: legacy import — see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: `M21-tsl-investigate` ✅ Research note at `docs/research/m21-tsl-investigation.md` — verdict: **defer until WebGPU lands**.
stories.summary: TSL's node-graph verbosity beats inline GLSL ~10× in JSON LOC; pitch (one source → WebGL + WebGPU) only materialises after `M21-webgpu-spike`. Keep the S40/S41 GLSL paths.
verification: legacy import — see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: `M17-static-merge-spike` ✅ Research note at `docs/research/m17-static-merge-investigation.md` — verdict: **don't ship a static-merge…
stories.summary: `M17-static-merge-spike` ✅ Research note at `docs/research/m17-static-merge-investigation.md` — verdict: **don't ship a static-merge primitive yet**. InstancedMesh (S35) + BatchedMesh (S40) cover every shipped project; static-merge's real target is 10k+ static-prop scenes that AGF doesn't have today. The more valuable follow-up was `M17-instance-picking-buckets` (now shipped).
verification: legacy import — see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

stories.title: `M17-instance-picking-buckets` — `pickAtNdc` returns a discriminated `PickHit` covering Mesh / InstancedMesh / BatchedMesh slots.
stories.summary: RuntimeHandle.pick resolves bucket slots by scanning entities with `BatchedMeshHandle` (O(N) on a click — cold path). Verified: clicking `batch-bench?seed=64`'s centre returns a `bench.<i>` entity instead of falling through.
verification: legacy import — see sprint notes[] for the original sprint-level verification

followUps: `M21-shadow-pcss-modern` — rewrite PCSS substitution against the modern PCF chunk (Vogel disc + sampler2DShadow + `texture(...)`). Today's S41 implementation only hits the BASIC variant.
`M21-shadow-pcss-csm` — extend the substitution into `three/addons/csm/CSMShader.js` so cascade-shadow scenes (`shadows-bench`) get PCSS too.
`M21-cam-cinematic` — declarative camera-track playback with waypoint interpolation.
notes: Deliverables: `engine/render/systems/follow-camera-system.ts` (new); `engine/render/three-render-adapter.ts` — `EnvironmentSpec` union, RGBELoader hdr path, discriminated `PickHit` + bucket pick branches.; `engine/render/shadow-pcss.ts` — doc gap on BASIC vs PCF scope.; `engine/runtime/start.ts` — env-hdr narrow + pick bucket resolution.; `engine/core/ecs/types.ts` — `SceneEnvironmentInput` discriminated union.; `schemas/scene.schema.json` — `followCameraComponent`, `environment.kind: "hdr"` + allOf+if/then for `url`.; `tests/unit/follow-camera-system.test.ts` (new) — 5 cases.; `tests/unit/scene-environment-schema.test.ts` — 4 hdr cases.; `docs/research/m21-tsl-investigation.md` (new).; `docs/research/m17-static-merge-investigation.md` (new).

Verification: `npm run preflight` — 408 unit tests pass; e2e mixed (hmr-stress / multiclient flaky under parallel load, deterministic in isolation — verified by re-running just those specs).; `beacon-world-gameplay.spec` ✅.; Bucket pick smoke against `batch-bench?seed=64` returns a Batchable entity from the bucket.
